Description

The Menzerna Premium pads with their safety edge perfectly Optimized for: - Heavy Cut Foam Pad - Medium Cut Foam Pad - Soft Cut Foam Pad - Wax Foam Pad adapt to the backing plate and prevent damage to the surface.

- Menzerna Premium Backing Plate is a high-quality, flexible disc with effective Velcro underside

- Supports comfortable, safe working of corners, edges and curvatures

- Suitable for all common polishing machines. The Menzerna Premium pads with their safety edge perfectly adapt to the backing plate and prevent damage to the surface.
